query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of an interior scene featuring a partially open paneled door with a rectangular glass window and dark doorknob on the left. To the right, the figure of a man wearing a zip-front cardigan and light-colored trousers appears near a wall with a diamond-patterned wire mesh and a dark doorway behind him.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white double exposure photograph in which a semi-transparent man wearing a zip-up cardigan and light trousers is ghosted over an interior scene. The layered image overlaps the figure with a partially open paneled door, a dark doorway, and a chain-link fence pattern, creating a translucent, dreamlike portrait that merges the subject with the architectural surroundings.
